Thanks for contributing! A quick checklist:

- [ ] The change is covered by tests (or the change is type-only / docs-only).
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build` is green locally.
- [ ] If this changes shipped behaviour, a changeset is included
      (`pnpm changeset`).
- [ ] If it's a breaking change, BREAKING_CHANGES.md is updated.
-->
